title: Zaria, Kaduna — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Zaria, Kaduna: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Zaria is a city in Kaduna with a population of 975,000. A historic city in northern Nigeria, home to Ahmadu Bello University and a center of Hausa culture and Islamic learning.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
